full_text:
Yan Wu (Ziqing) 嚴武 (子卿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Wu (嚴武), styledZiqing (子卿). A relation to Yan Jun, he was a master Go player. Yan Wu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
